description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black finish and a streamlined, angular body. It has a thumbhole stock integrated into the rear, providing ergonomic support and a distinctive silhouette. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the front end includes a vertical foregrip for enhanced control. The barrel is relatively short, making the weapon compact and suitable for close-quarters use, and the trigger guard is elongated and angular, blending into the lower receiver. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of metal and polymer materials for durability and reduced weight.
description: A compact, black tactical shotgun with a thumbhole stock, vertical foregrip, and full-length Picatinny rail, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thumbhole stock, vertical foregrip, and full-length Picatinny rail along the top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short barrel, vertical foregrip, and narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the thumbhole stock, trigger guard, and overall compactness.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the thumbhole stock opening and the alignment of the Picatinny rail.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, angular trigger guard integrated into the lower receiver, with a squared profile and no visible finger grooves
